'''samazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocosity|jocosity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocosity|jocosity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| samazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæmæzhæth|sæmæzhæth]] || [[word:sæmæzhæj|sæmæzhæj]] || [[word:sæmæzhæsh|sæmæzhæsh]] || [[word:sæmæzhæ|sæmæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:samamazhath|samamazhath]] || [[word:samamazhaj|samamazhaj]] || [[word:samamazhash|samamazhash]] || [[word:samamazha|samamazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:samazhath|samazhath]] || [[word:samazhaj|samazhaj]] || [[word:samazhash|samazhash]] || [[word:samazha|samazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:samafzhafth|samafzhafth]] || [[word:samafzhafj|samafzhafj]] || [[word:samafzhafsh|samafzhafsh]] || [[word:samafzhaf|samafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:samazhatha|samazhatha]] || [[word:samazhaja|samazhaja]] || [[word:samazhasha|samazhasha]] || [[word:samazhaka|samazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:samazhath|samazhath]] || [[word:samazhaj|samazhaj]] || [[word:samazhash|samazhash]] || [[word:samazha|samazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:samazhathal|samazhathal]] || [[word:samazhajal|samazhajal]] || [[word:samazhashal|samazhashal]] || [[word:samazhakal|samazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:samazhaathatha|samazhaathatha]] || [[word:samazhaajaja|samazhaajaja]] || [[word:samazhaashasha|samazhaashasha]] || [[word:samazhaaka|samazhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:samazhathan|samazhathan]] || [[word:samazhajan|samazhajan]] || [[word:samazhashan|samazhashan]] || [[word:samazhakan|samazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:samazhathaoro|samazhathaoro]] || [[word:samazhajaoro|samazhajaoro]] || [[word:samazhashaoro|samazhashaoro]] || [[word:samazhakaoro|samazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
